insights: The North region generated the highest revenue at 2540.00, accounting for 41.91% of total revenue.
The average sales per transaction is 1212.00, with a standard deviation of 179.08, indicating variability in sales.
Sales ranged from a minimum of 980.00 to a maximum of 1430.00, suggesting potential outlier behavior in sales figures.
recommendations: Focus on enhancing marketing efforts in the North region to capture further market share.
Investigate the factors leading to lower sales figures in the South region, where sales were only 980.00.
Monitor transactions closely to understand variability and identify best practices for high-performing sales.
